name: kara
role: frontend

The freeze got pushed — in the last planning meeting we moved it to the 30th to
give the new onboarding flow time to land. So I've got until midweek next week,
which is good because the design review on the onboarding screens isn't until
Monday. Pacing to land Tuesday the 30th with a day of slack.

Not rushing this week; the extra runway is exactly why we moved the date.
